{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318364913FEA6029B549A13E64A"}"},"total":121},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604372069992334105","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事情节的起伏伏，值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770533368,"group_id":"7540977099348134936","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyh6U1NGS3vEKX3Nl/Gmp/hUZRDY21fLfMrDjja5w010","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1271500737611966","user_name":"喜欢萎蒿的俊彦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1271500737611966","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1769580961,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7540977099348134936","book_info":{"abstract":"高考文科状元沈平意外穿越，成为侯爵府纨绔世子。
姐姐是大楚贵妃，权倾后宫；父亲是大楚平阳侯，官至户部侍郎。
这身份背景不可谓不显赫，沈平对这日子很满意。本想就这样当个废物逍遥一辈子，却不想树欲静而风不止。
后宫争宠不停，权谋暗斗不休，为了保护至亲家人，沈平只好在这古代重新捡起书本。
沈平：“我堂堂高考文科状元，还怕读书读不过你们这些穷酸腐儒？不服来战！”
国子监中人前显圣，科举考场连中三元。
当沈平配合楚皇将大刀架到那些高高在上的世家门阀头上时，所有人才恍悟过来眼前的小子早已不是当年那个不学无术的纨绔子弟。
世家：“沈郎君带人来了，快将族谱烧掉。”
异族：“沈阎王不要再杀了，吾等愿尊称你为天可汗。”
楚皇：“这皇位还是由小舅子你来坐吧。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/24aac2b771515d07f9bde33f6af431e6","author":"唐十玖","author_id":"","book_id":"7540977099348134936","book_name":"文科状元考科举，震惊满朝文武","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#98b0b0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6035人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7541288661749353496","read_count":"6035","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"888611"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"436","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,科举,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/30a23c5cbfd6d70ec80512b66cae1a5d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446209&x-signature=vUN0iQxo2VSSnxQ%2FzmE7cUC9xS0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"33"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318364913FEA6029B549A13E64A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4937,"re
